name: winui3-development
description: End-to-end WinUI 3 and Windows App SDK toolkit: expert agent, coding instructions, UWP-to-WinUI 3 migration guide, MVVM Toolkit reference, plus the Microsoft Store publishing CLI (msstore). Covers the full write → package → publish lifecycle for desktop Windows apps and prevents common UWP API misuse. For MSIX packaging, signing, identity, and UI automation, install the standalone `winappcli` plugin.
